description:
You are a Performance Engineer conducting a post-incident review. Correlate incoming Load against Database CPU, Web Speed, and EC2 CPU to identify bottlenecks by creating a Graphite dashboard named 'Dependency Bottleneck Correlation'. All metrics must be normalized to Z-scores for comparison. The dashboard must contain three graphs, each including a red 'Load Z-Score' reference line defined as: color(alias(normalize(nonNegativeDerivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count)), "Load Z-Score"), "red").

The 'Database vs Load' graph must include the Load reference line and the RDS metric: alias(normalize(servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization), "DB CPU Z-Score").
The 'Web Speed vs Load' graph must include the Load reference line and the web speed metric: alias(normalize(servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1), "Web Speed Z-Score").
The 'EC2 vs Load' graph must include the Load reference line and the EC2 CPU metric: alias(normalize(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization), "EC2 CPU Z-Score").

Save the completed dashboard. The nesting order of functions does not matter as long as all required transformations are applied.
